findings.description: Mary Purnell was a daughter of Thomas Purnell (of Trowbridge, Wiltshire) and his wife Amy (Newman). She was christened 1 September 1816 at Trowbridge, Wiltshire, and her baptism names Thomas as her father.
supporting_sources: England, Births and Christenings, 1538-1975 / Wiltshire parish register — baptism of Mary Purnell, 1 Sep 1816, Trowbridge, father Thomas Purnell.

findings.description: Elizabeth Purnell was a daughter of Thomas Purnell (of Trowbridge, Wiltshire) and his wife Amy (Newman). She was christened 6 August 1823 at Trowbridge, Wiltshire (born about 1822), and her baptism names Thomas as her father.
supporting_sources: England, Births and Christenings, 1538-1975 / Wiltshire parish register — baptism of Elizabeth Purnell, 6 Aug 1823, Trowbridge, father Thomas Purnell.
England and Wales Census, 1841 — Elizabeth Purnell, Trowbridge.

findings.description: Thomas Purnell (the younger) was a son of Thomas Purnell (of Trowbridge, Wiltshire) and his wife Amy (Newman). He was christened 6 August 1823 at Trowbridge, Wiltshire, and his baptism names Thomas (the elder) as his father.
supporting_sources: England, Births and Christenings, 1538-1975 / Wiltshire parish register — baptism of Thomas Purnell, 6 Aug 1823, Trowbridge, father Thomas Purnell.

findings.description: Job Purnell was a son of Thomas Purnell (of Trowbridge, Wiltshire) and his wife Amy (Newman), born about 1826. His baptism in the Wiltshire parish registers names Thomas as his father.
supporting_sources: England, Births and Christenings, 1538-1975 — Job Purnell, father Thomas Purnell (Wiltshire).
Later records for Job Purnell of Trowbridge (marriage 1844, 1851 census) corroborate the identity.
